baseModel.description: Shared overlay merged with the scene model before choosing day or night variants. Use with nightModel for time-of-day swaps.

model.description: Name of a replacement model defined in replacement_models.json.

nightModel.description: Name of a replacement model to merge or swap in during the configured time-of-day phase.

mergeWithOriginal.description: When true, overlay models are merged onto the scene model instead of replacing it. Defaults to false.

timeOfDay.description: Cycle phase when nightModel should start applying.

timeOfDayOff.description: Optional cycle phase when nightModel starts turning off at dawn. Omitted = mirror timeOfDay.

dayNightOnly.description: When true, time-of-day replacements only apply in the overworld with the daylight cycle enabled. Defaults to false.
